text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Mm-hm, Dad's still the comedian as always. Haha, the kiddos even
wrote comebacks to his dad jokes!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Well, at least it sounds like they liked the souvenir I sent 'em!
choice_data_list: Is that a letter from home?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Yup. My family even mentions you here. Take a look.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross hands me a page filled with the handwritten messages.
I spot a few backwards letters in the mix—clearly the work of her
siblings.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Every message is about the same thing—they're all brimming with
pride after seeing Tamamo Cross run on the tv program "First Day at
Tracen!"

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Oguri, Inari and I had a race for this show, ya see. They said we didn't
needa do it, but we all ran like it was the real deal!
choice_data_list: Right, they used the whole race, didn't they?
Right, they used the whole race, didn't they?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
They sure did. Dad's real happy with your training after seein' that.
He said you made his little girl into a star!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
"I better see my White Lightning and her trainer roarin' through the
competition!" Got that? Better not disappoint him!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Hahaha, All right, I'll let 'im know when I reply.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Oh yeah, and I wanna send my siblings some candy too. Mind comin'
with me to the store?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
That way you can pick out the candy we send. If anythin'll get ya into
their good books, it's sweets.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I've heard good things 'bout these chocolates. Ah, check it out.
They've got a peach flavor for a limited time too.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Oh, look at the size of this box of cookies! The tikes'll love this! And
the box looks so fancy!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Now that I'm lookin' 'round... There sure are a lotta choices. You ever
had any of these, Trainer? Any standouts?
choice_data_list: The fancy box of cookies is really good!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her siblings no doubt have healthy appetites, so sending them
something they can eat a lot of sounds like a good idea.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: All right, then I'll grab these cookies and some rice crackers too.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... Maybe I'll grab the chocolates as well. If I budget my money
this month, I can buy the regular and peach-flavored ones.
choice_data_list:
You shouldn't need to cut your own expenses
for it...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
It's not like I'm starving myself or anythin'. 'Sides, I'm used to livin' on
a budget.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At that moment, I remember one of the many messages her family
scrawled on their letter to her.

text_block_list.name: Letter
text_block_list.text:
"Thank you for the tasty candy, Tama. Didja get a chance to try 'em
yourself? Don't overdo it. You know we'd be happy with just a phone
call."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross's family explicitly told her to not overdo it. They know
she can't be leaving much pocket money for herself.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Okay, that should do it! I'll get all four!
choice_data_list: You're not going to buy something for yourself?
You're not going to buy something for yourself?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Why would I? Have ya seen Tracen's cafeteria? I'm eatin' like a queen
every day!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Livin' any fancier than that would feel like a crime!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, I'd rather see my family eatin' somethin' tasty than eat it
myself.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
After that, I got to thinkin' up ways I could make my family's dreams
come true. And eventually I landed on the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
My folks worked hard to get me into this academy, so I gotta make it
worth the price! That's why I gotta win! But...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's clear to me that she feels indebted to her family for sending her
to Tracen Academy. That's probably why she's putting them first here.
choice_data_list: Okay, just don't overdo it on the budgeting.
Okay, just don't overdo it on the budgeting.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
You questionin' my skills?! I'll have ya know I'm a pro when it comes
to livin' on da cheap! And what are ya, my mom?!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: A'ight, chill! Geez, maybe ya really are my mom!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross is clearly dedicated to her family, and it shows in her
races. But I can't help but feel that she could stand to indulge herself
every once in a while.
